title: Better Hunger
description: Improves hunger and food mechanics in Minecraft.
body:
This mod improves the food and hunger mechanics in Minecraft.

Features

Hide Hunger Bar
When enabled this will hide the hunger bar. This is disabled by default.

Never Hungry
Players will never become hungry. Their food and saturation will always be the maximum. This is disabled by default.

Always Edible Food
Players can always eat any food, regardless of if their hunger is full or not. This is enabled by default.

Hardcore Hunger
Players will instantly die if their food runs out. This is disabled by default.
